layout.layout_rhythm: broadside: medium density, medium-high formality. Dark editorial canvas with a single fire orange accent and bilingual Latin/Chinese type stack.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"pad_x": "5.5vw", "pad_y": "5.5vh", "gap_lg": "3.5vh", "gap_md": "2vh", "gap_sm": "1vh"}

cjk_policy.known_degradation: **No CDN Chinese face matches Barlow's monolithic grotesque + lowercase identity.** Barlow's distinctive choice in this system is lowercase-display at heavy weights — and CJK has no equivalent expressive lever. The system's "protest-poster lowercase-shouting" character softens to "heavy-serif declarative." The two-register color system (dark / orange) and th

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

var(--gap-lg)" > 02 / Chapter

the next chapter begins here

var(--gap-lg)" > On speed

"Move fast and you'll break things. Move slow and something else will break you."
[Industry Leader] [Source] · [Year]
Before · After 09
Before

six-month build cycles

Teams planned for months before shipping anything. By launch, the market had moved.

  • Waterfall planning, quarterly roadmaps
  • User testing at the end, not the start
  • Success measured by features shipped
After

two-week iteration loops

Ship a rough version. Watch what users actually do. Rebuild. Ship again.

  • Weekly user sessions, continuous discovery
  • Metrics reviewed daily, not quarterly
  • Success measured by behavior change

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

text_decoration_policy.underline.color.raw_value: ; the primary rhythm is Barlow's own weight and size axis. Italic is not used. Underline is not used.
